headline: 3 Reasons GEHC is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: GE HealthCare has gotten torched over the last six months - since January 2026, its stock price has dropped 22.7% to $64.05 per share. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
